productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Pacey Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionSea foam green top made of 95% viscose and 5% lycra, with ribbed neckline, chiffon ruffles running from necline to hemline, chiffon cap sleeves and embroidered lettering on the back behind neckFittingRegular Chest - 30 cm Wash careMachine wash Cold waterWash with like coloursWash/dry inside outUse mild detergentsDo not tumble dryUse warm ironDo not iron on decorRemove all detachable accessoriesGet ready to indulge the ballerina in your little girl with this  soft sea foam top from gini and jony. The soft viscose fabric, the wave inspired ruffles and the "Ballerina Princess" lettering on the back will surely transport her to a world of magic and fantasy. Team this with a white skirt and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
